body:
This PR overhauls grid utils + adds `minimum_x/y/zspacing` methods that work on any grid.

(with @glwagner)

Closes #1119
title: Completely overhaul grid utils + `min_Δx/y/z` -> `minimum_spacing` + move `x/y/zspacing` to `Grids`

body:
Apparently, the issue with #2996 is caused by the fact that slurping inside a kernel signature 
i.e:
```
@kernel function test_func(r, c, args...)
      i, j, k = @index(Global, NTuple)
      r[i, j, k] = whatever_inlined_function(i, j, k, c, args...)
end
```
This can be fixed by passing the size of the `Vararg` tuple
like this
```
@kernel function test_func(r, c, args::Vararg{T, N}) where {T, N}
      i, j, k = @index(Global, NTuple)
       r[i, j, k] = whatever_inlined_function(i, j, k, c, args...)
end
```

Edit, this approach only works if all Varargs are of the same type `T`.

Edit, Edit, with @glwagner we decided to pass all additional arguments to the kernel as a tuple, so
```
@kernel function test_func(r, c, args)
      i, j, k = @index(Global, NTuple)
      r[i, j, k] = whatever_inlined_function(i, j, k, c, args...)
end
```
which means that from now on, when calling a kernel
```
caller_func(arch, grid, r, c, args...) = launch!(arch, grid, worksize, test_func, r, c, args...)
```
will become
```
caller_func(arch, grid, r, c, args...) = launch!(arch, grid, worksize, test_func, r, c, Tuple(args))
```
Resolves #2996

labels.description: So we can get the wrong answer even faster
labels.name: performance 🏍️

title: Fixes CPU slowdown with KernelAbstractions >= v0.8

labels.description: Even a perfect program still has bugs
labels.name: bug 🐞

labels.description: So things don't blow up and boil the lobsters alive
labels.name: numerics 🧮

body:
This PR changes the behavior `RiBasedVerticalDiffusivity` to compute eddy diffusivities with a moving average in time, rather than using instantaneous values.

This has the effect of eliminating vertical "noise" that is present without time-averaging:

# Without time-averaging

https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/15271942/226771108-213d709c-a95c-4e1e-a469-8dd7826635c1.mp4


# With time-averaging

https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/15271942/226771068-cfe964a5-033f-46e2-989f-39623a4e2912.mp4

This PR also unifies the notation for eddy diffusivities between `CATKEVerticalDiffusivity`, `RiBasedVerticalDiffusivity`, and `ConvectiveAdjustmentVerticalDiffusivity`.

~~Before merging I plan to re-calibrate the parameters for `RiBasedVerticalDiffusivity`.~~
title: Time-averaged eddy diffusivities for `RiBasedVerticalDiffusivity`
